content.query:
USE nyctaxi_db;

-- Drop taxi_zone_lookup so we can drop bronze_source
DROP EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.taxi_zone_lookup;

-- Recreate both data sources with credential now attached
DROP EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE bronze_source;
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE bronze_source
WITH (
    LOCATION   = 'https://adlsnyctaxide.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze',
    CREDENTIAL = WorkspaceIdentity
);

DROP EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE silver_source;
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE silver_source
WITH (
    LOCATION   = 'https://adlsnyctaxide.dfs.core.windows.net/silver',
    CREDENTIAL = WorkspaceIdentity
);

-- Recreate taxi_zone_lookup on credentialed bronze_source
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.taxi_zone_lookup (
    LocationID    INT,
    Borough       VARCHAR(50),
    Zone          VARCHAR(100),
    service_zone  VARCHAR(50)
)
WITH (
    LOCATION     = 'reference/taxi_zone_lookup.csv',
    DATA_SOURCE  = bronze_source,
    FILE_FORMAT  = csv_format
);

-- Recreate silver_yellow_trips_2024 on credentialed silver_source
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.silver_yellow_trips_2024 (
    VendorID              INT,
    pickup_datetime       DATETIME2,
    dropoff_datetime      DATETIME2,
    trip_duration_mins    INT,
    pickup_location_id    INT,
    dropoff_location_id   INT,
    passenger_count       FLOAT,
    trip_distance         FLOAT,
    fare_amount           FLOAT,
    tip_amount            FLOAT,
    tolls_amount          FLOAT,
    congestion_surcharge  FLOAT,
    airport_fee           FLOAT,
    total_amount          FLOAT,
    payment_type          INT
)
WITH (
    LOCATION     = 'yellow_taxi/year=2024/',
    DATA_SOURCE  = silver_source,
    FILE_FORMAT  = parquet_format
);
